Appearances via Zoom Conference
Victor Look, Esq. LOOKLAWPC, (310) 818-3722 Attorney for Plaintiff OUTCO, INC. (Counsel seeking withdrawel)
No Other apperaneces.

Hearing held. Discussed, not ARGUED.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF OUTCO INC. is granted.

Counsel is to submit a proposed order using the Mandatory JCC Form MC-053.
